title: heterostemma angustilobum
intro: Heterostemma angustilobum is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, commonly known as the Indian spurge or snake vine. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Heterostemma angustilobum include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. Heterostemma angustilobum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are often used in traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
